hero.headline: Expert Electrical Services You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: From emergency repairs to full rewiring, we deliver safe, code-compliant electrical solutions with unmatched professionalism.

featureSections.title: Keeping Your Home Safe & Powered
featureSections.body: From flickering lights to complete panel upgrades, our licensed electricians handle all residential electrical needs. We prioritize safety, code compliance, and minimal disruption to your daily life.
featureSections.cardBody: Old wiring can be a fire hazard. We replace outdated systems with modern, safe wiring that meets current codes.

featureSections.title: Powering Your Business Operations
featureSections.body: Downtime costs money. Our commercial electricians provide fast, reliable service for offices, retail spaces, and industrial facilities. We work around your schedule to minimize disruption.
featureSections.cardBody: Reduce your electricity bills with a professional energy audit. We identify waste and recommend cost-saving upgrades.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured

whyChooseUs.title: Prompt & Reliable

whyChooseUs.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work. If you're not happy, we'll make it right — no questions asked.

servicesPage.intro: At Buzz Electrics, we offer a full range of electrical services for residential and commercial clients in Dallas. Our licensed electricians combine technical expertise with exceptional customer service to deliver safe, reliable, and efficient solutions. Explore our services below or call us to discuss your project.

services.title: Residential Wiring & Rewiring
services.shortDescription: Safe, code-compliant wiring for new homes, additions, and old house rewiring.
services.longDescription: Whether you're building a new home or updating outdated wiring, our team ensures every wire is installed to the highest safety standards. We handle everything from rough-in wiring to complete rewires, minimizing dust and disruption.
benefits: Fewer tripped breakers and flickering lights
Peace of mind with code compliance

process.title: Inspection & Assessment
process.description: We inspect your current wiring and discuss your needs to create a tailored plan.

process.title: Installation & Upgrades
process.description: Our electricians install new wiring, outlets, and panels with precision and care.

process.title: Testing & Final Walkthrough
process.description: We test every circuit and walk you through the work to ensure your satisfaction.

faqs.question: How do I know if my home needs rewiring?
faqs.answer: Signs include frequent breaker trips, flickering lights, burning smells, or outlets that are warm to the touch. If your home is over 40 years old, it's worth an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does a full rewiring take?
faqs.answer: A typical whole-home rewiring can take 3-7 days depending on the size and complexity of the home.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel to handle modern power demands safely.
services.longDescription: An outdated electrical panel can be a fire hazard and limit your ability to use modern appliances. We upgrade panels to 200 amps or more, ensuring your home has the capacity it needs.

process.title: Load Calculation
process.description: We calculate your home's electrical load to determine the right panel size.

process.title: Permitting & Preparation
process.description: We handle all permits and prepare your home for a smooth upgrade.

process.title: Installation & Inspection
process.description: Our team installs the new panel and passes all required inspections.

faqs.question: What size panel do I need?
faqs.answer: Most modern homes require 200 amps. If you have a large home or many appliances, we may recommend 400 amps.

faqs.question: How much does a panel upgrade cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary based on the panel size and complexity. We provide a free, no-obligation quote before starting any work.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, energy-efficient lighting for indoors and outdoors.
services.longDescription: Transform your space with custom lighting design. From cozy ambient lighting to task lighting and outdoor security lights, we help you choose and install fixtures that enhance your home's beauty and functionality.
benefits: Lower energy bills with LED options

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We discuss your vision and recommend fixtures and layouts that fit your style and budget.

process.title: Fixture Selection & Procurement
process.description: We help you select quality fixtures and order them at competitive prices.

process.title: Installation & Setup
process.description: Our electricians install all fixtures, switches, and dimmers for a seamless finish.

faqs.question: Can you install smart lighting?
faqs.answer: Yes! We specialize in smart lighting systems that you can control via your phone or voice assistant.

faqs.question: Do you offer outdoor lighting?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We install landscape lighting, security lights, and patio fixtures to brighten your outdoor spaces.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency service for outages, sparks, and other hazards.
services.longDescription: Electrical emergencies don't wait for business hours. Our team is on call 24/7 to handle power outages, sparking outlets, exposed wires, and other dangerous situations. We arrive quickly to restore safety and power.

process.title: Emergency Call
process.description: Call our hotline anytime. We'll dispatch a technician immediately.

process.title: On-Site Assessment
process.description: Our electrician arrives and assesses the hazard, taking immediate safety measures.

process.title: Repair & Restoration
process.description: We fix the issue and restore power safely, then provide a full report.

faqs.question: What qualifies as an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: Any situation that poses a fire or shock risk: sparking outlets, burning smells, power outages, or exposed wires.

faqs.question: How fast can you get here?
faqs.answer: We typically arrive within 1-2 hours for emergency calls in the Dallas area.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Electricians
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services that exceed expectations — every time.
story: Buzz Electrics was founded in 2008 by a team of master electricians who saw a need for honest, high-quality electrical work in Dallas. Starting with a single truck and a commitment to excellence, we built a reputation for solving tough electrical problems with precision and care. Today, we serve hundreds of homeowners and businesses across the metroplex, from historic homes in Lakewood to modern offices in Uptown.

Our team undergoes continuous training to stay current with the latest codes and technologies. We believe in doing the job right the first time, with transparent communication and fair pricing. Whether it's a simple outlet repair or a complex commercial installation, we treat every project with the same dedication.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every job meets or exceeds code requirements.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We give honest advice, transparent pricing, and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: Our electricians take pride in clean, precise work that looks as good as it performs.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: We listen to your needs and tailor solutions to fit your home and budget.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out the form for a free estimate.
